mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO inspection_route_device
route_code, route_name, equipment_code, equipment_name, sort, creator_id, created_at, updated_at,
#{routeCode}, #{routeName}, #{equipmentCode}, #{equipmentName}, #{sort}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT ird.id, ird.route_code, ird.route_name, ird.equipment_code, ird.equipment_name, ird.sort, ird.creator_id, ird.created_at AS createdAt, ird.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM inspection_route_device ird WHERE ird.id = #{id}
AND ird.creator_id = #{creatorId}

SELECT ird.id, ird.route_code, ird.route_name, ird.equipment_code, ird.equipment_name, ird.sort, ird.creator_id, ird.created_at AS createdAt, ird.updated_at AS updatedAt, su.real_name AS creatorName, su.username AS creatorUsername FROM inspection_route_device ird LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ird.creator_id = su.id
AND ird.creator_id = #{creatorId}
AND ird.route_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{routeCode}, '%')
AND ird.equipment_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentCode}, '%')
AND ird.equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentName}, '%')
ORDER BY ird.sort ASC, ird.id DESC
